title: Satya 01414 Nag Champa (TREE OF LIFE) Incense Sticks 12 Packs x 15g
features: The original and best Satya Sai Baba Nag Champa incense from the Shrinivas Sugandhalaya factory.
The Nag Champa Collection is the most famous brand of incense in the world by far . It is traditionally made from a sandalwood base to which are added a variety of flower oils
Each 15g pack contains around 12-15 incense sticks (determined by weight), Each incense stick is individually hand rolled in the high quality oils so each stick can vary slightly in its thickness
This is export qualilty REXPO range as specified in the box. Machine made incenses. Made in India.
description: Light a Satya Sai Baba product and let your home become transformed into a place of tranquillity and relaxation. Satya Sai Baba products are available in many forms although Nag Champa incense sticks remain the most popular way to enjoy this world famous fragrance. Satya Sai Baba products are generally recognised as the best of all masala incenses. Traditionally it is used in Ashrams which can includes places where yoga is performed, religious ceremonies and musical studies. These products are made in India using pure extracts and the finest scented oils. Let this potent and sweet smelling aroma fill your home and create an atmosphere of relaxation. Using incense sticks is easy, just light the end, wait for it to glow and blow out the flame. Then place it into an incense holder and enjoy the wonderful fragrance that is produced.
